source.name: Chapter 1.2: 1.4 Test Your Knowledge - Flow Calling an Action
source.instructions: **When a flow step uses `- action: action_bank_hours`, what happens next?**

answers.answer: Rasa looks up a predefined response in the domain and sends it
The user is prompted to type a message
The flow stops and waits for a manual trigger
Rasa finds the action in the actions/ folder and executes its run() method

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT describe how a flow invokes an action
source.guidance: When a flow has a step like `- action: action_bank_hours`, Rasa finds the corresponding action (by name) in the actions/ folder, then executes that action's run() method. The action runs your Python code and can send messages via the dispatcher. Rasa handles the execution; you provide the logic.
